belier.intro: The Moon has shifted into Taurus at 5 degrees today, settling into your second house just as the Last Quarter phase brings a decisive, slightly tense energy at 57 percent illumination. Saturn and Neptune retrograde remain behind you in your first house, still refining who you are, but today's focus moves outward toward what you own, earn, and value. The Leo Sun in your fifth house adds warmth and a touch of playfulness to an otherwise practical day.
belier.love: Practical gestures of care matter more today than grand declarations. A partner who shows up with reliable support is speaking your language right now.
belier.work: The Last Quarter phase favors decisive action on financial or resource matters that have lingered too long. Make the call you have been postponing.
belier.energy: Your fire settles into something steadier and more earthbound today, useful for finishing rather than starting.
belier.intuition: A gut sense about a financial decision is worth trusting today, especially if it contradicts what looks good on paper.
belier.mantra: I value what is real and lasting over what merely looks good.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon returns to your own sign today at 5 degrees Taurus, and the Last Quarter phase brings a grounded but decisive quality right where you feel most at home. This first house placement sharpens your sense of self just as the Leo Sun lights your fourth house, drawing attention to matters of home and emotional foundation. It is a day for honest self-assessment rather than external performance.
taureau.love: You know what you need today with unusual clarity. State it plainly rather than waiting to be asked.
taureau.work: Decisions about your own direction, rather than group consensus, are favored under this Last Quarter Moon in your sign.
taureau.energy: Your natural steadiness is at its peak today. Use it to finish what the waning Moon phase asks you to release.
taureau.intuition: Trust your first instinct about yourself today over anyone else's opinion of who you should be.
taureau.mantra: I know myself and I act from that knowing.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees moves through your twelfth house today, and the Last Quarter phase asks for retreat and release rather than forward motion. Saturn and Neptune retrograde no longer weigh on your eleventh house from yesterday but shift focus toward private processing, while the Leo Sun in your third house keeps your mind active even as your energy turns inward.
gemeaux.love: A quiet, private conversation serves a relationship better today than a public or performative one.
gemeaux.work: Finish unfinished business quietly today rather than launching anything new. The Last Quarter favors completion.
gemeaux.energy: Your usual quickness slows today, and that is appropriate. Honor the need for rest before the new cycle begins.
gemeaux.intuition: Something surfacing from your subconscious, perhaps in a dream, carries a message worth writing down.
gemeaux.mantra: I release what the old cycle no longer needs.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees fills your eleventh house today, bringing steady, loyal energy to friendships and future plans as the Last Quarter phase asks you to evaluate rather than expand. The Leo Sun in your own second house keeps questions of security and self-worth close, while your ruling Moon settles into a decisive, grounded mood.
cancer.love: A friend's steady presence may reveal itself as something more today. Notice who has quietly earned your trust.
cancer.work: A collective project benefits from a clear, honest assessment today. Decide what to keep and what to let go.
cancer.energy: Steady rather than dramatic, your energy today favors long-term thinking over quick wins.
cancer.intuition: Your sense of which alliances are truly reciprocal is sharp today. Trust the pattern you have observed.
cancer.mantra: I invest in bonds that give as much as they take.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees moves through your tenth house today, and the Last Quarter phase brings a serious, decisive energy to career matters. Saturn and Neptune retrograde have shifted from your ninth house into the background as the Sun in your own sign keeps your confidence steady and warm despite the practical demands of the day.
lion.love: Ambition may take center stage today, and a supportive partner understands this without needing constant attention.
lion.work: A professional decision reaches a natural turning point today. The Last Quarter favors closing one chapter before opening another.
lion.energy: Your solar warmth remains strong, but today it channels into disciplined effort rather than spontaneous display.
lion.intuition: A quiet certainty about your professional path deserves trust today, even if it requires patience.
lion.mantra: I move toward my goals with steady, earned confidence.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees lights your ninth house today, bringing a grounded, practical quality to questions of belief and long-range vision as the Last Quarter phase favors decision over exploration. The Leo Sun in your twelfth house adds a layer of private reflection beneath your usual analytical clarity.
vierge.love: A shared philosophy or life vision with a partner deserves honest examination today, without rushing to conclusions.
vierge.work: Educational or long-term planning matters reach a decision point today. Choose the practical path over the merely appealing one.
vierge.energy: Your earth element grounds even expansive ninth house energy today, keeping you practical rather than scattered.
vierge.intuition: A belief you have held for a long time is quietly tested today. If it holds up under scrutiny, keep it.
vierge.mantra: I test my beliefs and keep only what proves true.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees moves through your eighth house today, and the Last Quarter phase brings intensity and decisiveness to matters of shared resources and trust. The Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps friendships supportive in the background, even as deeper currents demand your attention.
balance.love: A conversation about trust or shared finances reaches a decisive point today. Say plainly what you need.
balance.work: Contracts, negotiations, or shared financial matters benefit from firm, grounded decisions today rather than more deliberation.
balance.energy: Steady rather than dramatic, your energy supports difficult but necessary conversations today.
balance.intuition: Your read on someone's true financial or emotional intentions is unusually accurate today.
balance.mantra: I decide with clarity where I once hesitated.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees opposes your sign from the seventh house today, and the Last Quarter phase casts a decisive light on your closest partnerships. The Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps career visibility high, adding pressure to balance public and private priorities.
scorpion.love: A relationship reaches a point of clarity today. Whatever the answer, it is better known than avoided.
scorpion.work: Professional partnerships benefit from directness today. State your terms rather than managing around them.
scorpion.energy: Balance comes through decisive conversation today rather than avoidance or withdrawal.
scorpion.intuition: Your sense of a partner's true position is sharp today. Trust the steady signal over reassuring words.
scorpion.mantra: I choose clarity over comfortable avoidance.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees moves through your sixth house today, bringing practical, grounded focus to routine and wellbeing as the Last Quarter phase asks for discipline over exploration. The Leo Sun in your ninth house keeps your appetite for meaning alive even as daily details demand attention.
sagittaire.love: Small, consistent gestures of care mean more today than adventurous gestures. Show up reliably.
sagittaire.work: A structured, disciplined approach to your responsibilities outperforms enthusiasm today. Finish what you started.
sagittaire.energy: Grounded rather than restless, your energy favors steady physical routine today.
sagittaire.intuition: Your body signals which habits genuinely serve you. Listen before pushing through discomfort.
sagittaire.mantra: I build freedom through steady, reliable discipline.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees fills your fifth house today, bringing steady creative and romantic energy as the Last Quarter phase favors finishing over beginning. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds intensity to matters of trust and shared resources, deepening an otherwise light-hearted day.
capricorne.love: Romantic gestures land best today when they are grounded and genuine rather than grand.
capricorne.work: A creative project nearing completion benefits from your disciplined attention today. Finish it properly.
capricorne.energy: Steady and productive, your energy favors tangible creative output today.
capricorne.intuition: A quiet creative impulse, however small, deserves your trust and follow-through today.
capricorne.mantra: I finish what I start with steady care.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees moves through your fourth house today, bringing grounded attention to home and family as the Last Quarter phase favors resolution. Saturn retrograde continues its quiet structuring work in your own sign, while the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key relationship prominent.
verseau.love: A direct, grounded conversation about home or future plans serves a relationship well today.
verseau.work: Balancing home responsibilities with professional ones reaches a workable resolution today.
verseau.energy: Domestic, grounding activities restore you more than external stimulation today.
verseau.intuition: A pattern from your upbringing surfaces today, asking to be consciously chosen rather than repeated.
verseau.mantra: I build a stable foundation on my own terms.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon in Taurus at 5 degrees fills your third house today, bringing steady, communicative energy as the Last Quarter phase favors clear decisions. The Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps daily routines and responsibilities in focus, grounding your usually dreamy nature in practical matters.
poissons.love: A calm, straightforward conversation serves a relationship better today than an emotionally charged one.
poissons.work: Correspondence and short-term planning benefit from clarity and decisiveness today rather than more deliberation.
poissons.energy: Steady mental energy supports focused, practical tasks today.
poissons.intuition: A clear thought about a daily matter, rather than a vague feeling, deserves your trust today.
poissons.mantra: I communicate with clarity and steady confidence.
poissons.author: Sibylle
